revision.comment: Created page with "<includeonly>[[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] {{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{今日..."
revision.text: <includeonly>[[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{今日の旧暦暫定/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{今日の旧暦暫定/日}}]], {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}<\includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] </noinclude>

[[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{今日の旧暦暫定/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{今日の旧暦暫定/日}}]], {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] </noinclude>

[[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{今日の旧暦暫定/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{今日の旧暦暫定/日}}]], {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] </noinclude>

{{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{今日の旧暦暫定/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{今日の旧暦暫定/日}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "今日の旧暦暫定" to "Today's provisional lunar calendar"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] </noinclude>

{{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today]][[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Today's provisional lunar calendar/日" to "Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today]][[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Today's provisional lunar calendar/月" to "Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today]][[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: getting rid of category cruft for potential import to simple english wikipedia All categories go to [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] </noinclude>

Unlike the other ones I pretty much made this myself. </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Today's provisional lunar calendar" to "Lunisolar Today"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Lunisolar Today/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Lunisolar Today/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] Note that this corresponds to [[:ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] but actually is not a translation of it at all. Unlike the other ones I pretty much made this myself. </noinclude>

Unlike the other ones I pretty much made this myself. </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q22826753}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
{{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Lunisolar Today/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Lunisolar Today/Day}}]]<noinclude>
[[ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] Note that this corresponds to [[:ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] but actually is not a translation of it at all. Unlike the other ones I pretty much made this myself. </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q22826753}}</noinclude> [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]

{{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Lunisolar Today/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Lunisolar Today/Day}}]]<noinclude>
[[ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] Note that this corresponds to [[:ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] but actually is not a translation of it at all. Unlike the other ones I pretty much made this myself. </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q22826753}}</noinclude> [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Lunisolar Today/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Lunisolar Today/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] Note that this corresponds to [[:ja:Template:今日の旧暦暫定]] but actually is not a translation of it at all. Unlike the other ones I pretty much made this myself. </noinclude> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q22826753}}</noinclude> [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
